title: Drag and drop files in forms
excerpt:
When creating a form and adding a question for a files column it would be much more useful for users to be able to drag and drop files instead of just clicking to browse for a file on the PC. 
  
This works great in your…

posts.author: MarkNariy (Mark McNairy)
posts.cookedHtml:
When creating a form and adding a question for a files column it would be much more useful for users to be able to drag and drop files instead of just clicking to browse for a file on the PC.

image923×263 7.71 KB

This works great in your module to submit support questions:

image773×719 28.5 KB

Please work on the beta form to allow drag and drop in the same way.

posts.author: Kristinemd13 (Kristine Brooks)
posts.cookedHtml: I sent the same screenshots to our CSM. WorkForms has introduced the ability to drag & drop files but at the expense of being able to see the files names that have been attached. Not a good user experience. One step forward, two steps back.
